current.summary: Fixed TUI help bar layout bug; Phase 10 Polish underway

activeWork.description: Phase 10 Polish: Fixed critical layout bug where help bar wrapping causes top bar disappearance. Help bar height changes (tab switches Config→Content) now trigger content model resizing via resizeContent() helper.
activeWork.progress: Bug fixed: Extracted resizeContent() helper, called from updateNavState(). When tab switches change help bar height, content models now resize. Tests added and passing. Code committed and pushed.

git.lastCommit: 773f3cd docs: add hook spec alignment design & status doc

recentDecisions: Help bar layout bug fixed by triggering content model resize on tab/hints changes, not truncating top of TUI
resizeContent() extracted as reusable helper for all tab transitions
nextSteps: Select Phase 10 Polish focus area: responsive layout edge cases, mouse parity audit, accessibility review, or golden test expansion

context.notes: Phase 10 is polish/refinement. Previous discovered work: Phase 8 Toasts needs polish (copy broken, missing close button, minimum width) — research BubbleTea v1.x clipboard support in go.mod. Two handoffs available; this one is most recent.
